creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Building or updating graphics/gdal results in a corrupt patching:

	===>>> Starting build for multiple ports <<<===


	===>>> Port directory: /usr/ports/graphics/gdal

	===>  Cleaning for gdal-1.8.1_3

	===>  License check disabled, port has not defined LICENSE
	===>  Found saved configuration for gdal-1.8.1_1
	===>  Extracting for gdal-1.8.1_3
	=> SHA256 Checksum OK for gdal-1.8.1.tar.gz.
	===>  Patching for gdal-1.8.1_3
	===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for gdal-1.8.1_3
	sed: 1: " s,%%MAKE_ENV%%,TMPDIR= ...": bad flag in substitute command: '-'
	*** [post-patch] Error code 1

	Stop in /usr/ports/graphics/gdal.
	*** [build] Error code 1

	Stop in /usr/ports/graphics/gdal.

	===>>> make failed for graphics/gdal
	===>>> Aborting update

	===>>> Update for gdal-1.8.1_3 failed
	===>>> Aborting update
